headlines.description: — Josh Giddey scored 23 points as part of his sixth triple-double this season, Coby White added 25 and the hot-shooting Chicago Bulls beat the Cleveland Cavaliers 127-111 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Josh Giddey, Coby White lead the way as the Bulls beat the Cavaliers 127-111

headlines.description: — Jaren Jackson Jr. had 28 points and 12 rebounds to lead a balanced scoring attack and the Memphis Grizzlies beat the Minnesota Timberwolves 116-110 on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jackson scores 28 points, Landale hits four 3s as Grizzlies top Timberwolves 116-110
